Atrium._comment_identities: REPLACE all three before launch. owner = deployer EOA (also ACM admin); transfer to multisig post-audit. keeper = APR-feed / sampling bot EOA. treasury = reserve-drain recipient.
Atrium._comment_externals: Arbitrum One. USDai/sUSDai are USD.AI; aavePool is Aave V3 Pool; benchmarkTokens are the Aave-supply-APR basket (USDC, USDT).
Atrium._comment_oracle: roundStaleAfter in seconds; feedDescription is informational.
Atrium._comment_accounting: Seeded Senior target/base APR, UD60x18 (1e18). 0.04e18 = 4%, 0.12e18 = 12%. Static until the Accounting feed amendment lands.
Atrium._comment_cooldowns: Per-tranche Strategy withdrawal cooldown (seconds), max 7 days. 0 = instant (skeleton/E2E default). Set real durations before public launch.
Atrium._comment_exitfees: Per-tranche fallback exit fee, UD60x18 (1e18), cap 0.1e18. 0 = no fee.
